title: Grayscale's Pandl hopes Strategy sells $3B in Bitcoin to restore confidence
summary: Grayscale's research head Zach Pandl said Strategy should sell $3 billion in Bitcoin to cover its cash obligations, but CryptoQuant argued the company has other ways to support STRC.

title: Base post-mortem reveals sequencer bug behind back-to-back outages
summary: A “race condition” after the system was reset prevented the sequencers from catching up, causing the second outage.

title: Warsh Makes Debut on the Global Stage With the Class of 2008
summary: Kevin Warsh and three other veterans of the 2008 global financial crisis will share a stage this week as the danger of renewed turmoil continues to haunt central bankers.

title: AI Bust Risks Ripple Effects From Growth to Credit, BIS Says
summary: An artificial-intelligence bust, inflation and fiscal stress are among the most alarming threats to global prosperity at present, the Bank for International Settlements warned.

title: The Stablecoin Founder Map Doesn't Match the Stablecoin Volume Map
summary: Emerging markets drive most real-world stablecoin usage, yet founder concentration and venture funding remain U.S.- and Europe-centric.

title: Billionaire Jeremy Grantham Dismisses Bitcoin, Says Crypto Will Fade 'With a Whimper'
summary: The seasoned investor has little faith in Bitcoin's staying power, expecting crypto to quietly fade away over time.

title: SecondFi maps recovery path after $2.4 million Cardano wallet exploit, aims to return funds within two weeks
summary: An exploit drained about $2.4 million in ADA from 374 addresses over three days through a flaw in SecondFi's wallet-generation software.

title: Average IBIT investor now down about 40% as spot bitcoin ETFs cap second-worst week on record
summary: Friday's $444.51 million net outflow capped a seventh straight negative week, the longest weekly run on record for the category.

title: Google caps Meta’s Gemini use as AI demand strains capacity
